nasb.text: And as Jesus returned, the people welcomed Him, for they had all been waiting for Him.

esv.text: Now when Jesus returned, the crowd welcomed him, for they were all waiting for him.

cnv.text: 耶穌回來的時候，眾人歡迎他，因為大家都在等著他。

ccb.text: 耶稣回到对岸，受到等候在那里的百姓的欢迎。

csbs.text: 耶稣回来的时候，一群人来欢迎他，原来大家一直在等候他。
